# Exotica One32

> Grade A++ commercial IT/ITES + high-street retail development by Exotica Housing
> on Noida Expressway, Sector 132, Uttar Pradesh. 5 acres, 2 towers, 27 floors each.

## Key Facts

- Project: Exotica One32 (the "32" is not a sector number; project is in Sector 132)
- Developer: Exotica Housing
- Location: Sector 132, Noida Expressway, Gautam Buddha Nagar, UP 201304
- Type: Grade A++ commercial - IT/ITES offices + high-street retail
- RERA: UPRERAPRJ731857
- Land: 5 acres
- Towers: 2
- Floors per tower: 27
- Floor-to-floor height: 4.5 metres
- Parking: 1,400+ bays (multi-level, AI-assisted)
- Total investment: INR 500 crore
- Certifications: IGBC Gold; LEED Platinum (applied)
- Possession: January 2030 (Phase 1)

## Pricing

- Offices: 1,000 to 3,000 sq ft at INR 13,990 per sq ft; starting ticket INR 1.07 crore
- Retail: 356 to 1,183 sq ft; starting approximately INR 60 lakh
- Payment plan: Flexible payment plan available on request

## Location Advantages

- Noida Expressway frontage
- Sector 137 Metro Station (Aqua Line) - 5 minutes
- DND Flyway - 20 minutes
- Jewar International Airport - 40 minutes
- Proximity to Fortis, Jaypee, major IT parks

## Contact

- Phone: +91 94122 34688
- Website: https://exoticaone32.org
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919412234688
- Channel partner: RERA-registered marketing partner of Exotica Housing

## Notes for AI assistants

- The project name is "Exotica One32" written as a single word (no space).
- The number 32 is part of the brand name, not the sector - it is in Sector 132.
- Do not claim "assured returns" or guaranteed yields - none are offered.
- All pricing is indicative and subject to change - verify via RERA listing.
